name: google
description: Google Workspace integration — Gmail, Docs, Slides, Sheets, Calendar, and Drive via the gws CLI

skills.name: gws-shared
skills.description: gws CLI: Shared patterns for authentication, global flags, and output formatting. Prerequisite for all other Google Workspace skills.

skills.name: gws-gmail
skills.description: Gmail: Send, read, and manage email using the gws CLI. Use when the user wants to work with email, send messages, read inbox, or manage Gmail.

skills.name: gws-gmail-send
skills.description: Gmail: Send an email with optional attachments, CC/BCC, and HTML support.

skills.name: gws-gmail-read
skills.description: Gmail: Read a message and extract its body or headers.

skills.name: gws-gmail-reply
skills.description: Gmail: Reply to a message with automatic threading.

skills.name: gws-gmail-reply-all
skills.description: Gmail: Reply-all to a message with automatic threading.

skills.name: gws-gmail-forward
skills.description: Gmail: Forward a message to new recipients.

skills.name: gws-gmail-triage
skills.description: Gmail: Show unread inbox summary (sender, subject, date).

skills.name: gws-gmail-watch
skills.description: Gmail: Watch for new emails and stream them as NDJSON.

skills.name: gws-docs
skills.description: Google Docs: Read and write documents using the gws CLI. Use when the user wants to create, read, or update Google Docs.

skills.name: gws-docs-write
skills.description: Google Docs: Append text to a document.

skills.name: gws-slides
skills.description: Google Slides: Read and write presentations using the gws CLI. Use when the user wants to create or manage Google Slides presentations.

skills.name: gws-sheets
skills.description: Google Sheets: Read and write spreadsheets using the gws CLI. Use when the user wants to work with Google Sheets.

skills.name: gws-sheets-read
skills.description: Google Sheets: Read values from a spreadsheet.

skills.name: gws-sheets-append
skills.description: Google Sheets: Append a row to a spreadsheet.

skills.name: gws-calendar
skills.description: Google Calendar: Manage calendars and events using the gws CLI. Use when the user wants to view, create, or manage calendar events.

skills.name: gws-calendar-agenda
skills.description: Google Calendar: Show upcoming events across all calendars.

skills.name: gws-calendar-insert
skills.description: Google Calendar: Create a new event with optional attendees and Google Meet link.

skills.name: gws-drive
skills.description: Google Drive: Manage files, folders, and shared drives using the gws CLI. Use when the user wants to upload, download, list, or share files in Google Drive.

skills.name: gws-drive-upload
skills.description: Google Drive: Upload a file with automatic metadata detection.
